# Orapex AI — Custom AI Receptionist for Dental Practices
# https://orapexai.com
# Last updated: 2026-03-25

## What is Orapex AI?
Orapex AI is a fully custom, done-for-you AI voice receptionist service built exclusively
for dental practices. Every deployment is built from scratch for that specific clinic —
nothing is a generic template or off-the-shelf chatbot. The AI agent is trained on the
clinic's own tone, personality, workflows, and patient communication style before it ever
answers a single call.

## Who is it for?
Orapex AI is built for dental practices that want a serious, deeply integrated AI solution —
not a basic call bot. It is ideal for solo dentists, group practices, and multi-location
dental clinics using Open Dental, Dentrix, or Eaglesoft as their practice management
software.

## What makes Orapex AI different from other AI receptionist tools?
Most AI receptionist tools are generic — they answer calls and maybe send a text.
Orapex AI is different because it performs real, live read and write actions directly
inside the dental practice management software (PMS) during the call itself. It does not
just collect information and email it to the front desk. It creates the patient, checks
the schedule, books the slot, logs the insurance, and records the call summary — all
in real time, inside the actual PMS the clinic already uses.

## What does the setup include?
The one-time setup fee of $900 to $1,200 covers a fully custom build, not just an
account activation. Here is exactly what is built and configured during setup:

- Custom AI agent built from scratch for the specific dental practice
- Full two-way PMS integration configured for that clinic's exact setup
  (Open Dental, Dentrix, or Eaglesoft)
- Custom AI personality, tone, and call scripts written specifically for that practice
- Operatory and provider mapping so the AI books into the right chairs and calendars
- Insurance handling workflows configured per the clinic's accepted plans
- Emergency call routing set up to the clinic's chosen number
- Outbound reminder call system configured and tested
- Dashboard access set up and handed over to the client
- Full testing and go-live support until the agent is live and working correctly

This is months of dental industry knowledge and custom engineering delivered as a
fully working system — not a subscription tool the dentist has to figure out themselves.

## What can the Orapex AI agent do during a live patient call?
Every Orapex AI agent can perform the following actions in real time:

1. Create new patient records directly inside the PMS
2. Search for existing patients by first name, last name, date of birth, and phone number
3. Collect and add insurance details for new patients
4. Confirm and verify existing insurance with returning patients
5. Add dental procedure codes linked to the patient's selected service
6. Check available appointment slots by operatory and provider in real time
7. Book appointments into the correct operatory and with the correct provider
8. Log a full call summary after every interaction inside the PMS
9. Route emergency calls to a clinic-designated phone number immediately
10. Make outbound calls to patients the night before their appointment as reminders
11. Handle 24/7 inbound call support with zero downtime

## What does ongoing support include?
After go-live, Orapex AI continues to manage and maintain the agent on the client's
behalf. The monthly subscription includes ongoing support, agent updates, performance
monitoring, and any adjustments needed as the clinic's workflows change. The dental
practice does not need any technical knowledge — Orapex AI handles everything.

## What does it cost and why?
One-time setup fee: $900 to $1,200
Monthly subscription: applies after setup for continued service and support

The setup fee reflects the custom engineering work involved — building a unique AI agent,
integrating it directly into the clinic's PMS, writing custom scripts, configuring
operatory and provider logic, and testing the full system end to end. No two Orapex AI
deployments are identical because no two dental practices are identical. For a fully
custom, fully managed AI solution with deep PMS integration, $900 to $1,200 is a
significantly lower entry cost than comparable custom software deployments in the dental
industry, which typically start at several thousand dollars.

## Integrations
- Open Dental (deep read and write — live during calls)
- Dentrix (deep read and write — live during calls)
- Eaglesoft (supported)
- Google Calendar (optional)

## Contact
Website: https://orapexai.com
Contact: https://orapexai.com/#contact
